role: Root feature index. Per-surface detail lives in the *_features.json files listed under `surfaces` (those stay the SSOT — do not duplicate their entries here). This file adds the cross-surface feature list with CURRENT verification status.

verification_legend.done: implemented + verified this pass (build, runtime probe, or e2e)
verification_legend.partial: implemented; some verification requires interactive TCC permissions

features.title: Loopback WebSocket bridge (ws://127.0.0.1:8787, NWProtocolWebSocket)
Flood resilience: raw-frame coalescing + adaptive 10Hz→2Hz flush + TCP receive backpressure
features.evidence: 2026-07-02 stress: CPU avg ~20% peak ~25% (was perma-100%), RSS flat ~90MB, post-flood settles to 7% baseline, sender throttled 875→239 msg/s

features.title: Bridge hardening: frame-size cap, conn cap, SSRF guard on artwork URLs, data:-URI safe decode
Chrome/Safari extension MediaSession capture (Spotify/YouTube/Apple Music)
features.evidence: BrowserExtension/ + SafariExtension/; lazy connect, idle retry stop (c8eb011)

features.title: Native MediaRemote capture (settings.nativeCaptureEnabled)
Artwork high-res chokepoint: CDN URL upgrade + pixel-size normalize + per-URL cache
Liquid Glass dynamic tint from album palette (dominant/vibrant/shadow membrane + soft-light bloom)
features.evidence: AdaptiveWidgetGlassBackground.swift; luminance clamp in ArtworkColorExtractor (brightness window 0.04–0.98, targets 0.56/0.46)

features.title: Glass tint strength picker (GlassTintStrength)

3-mode visualizer container (vinyl / image / cassette / liquidDisc), exhaustive switch
Swift-6-safe LRC lyrics engine pipeline
Widget size modes: Small / Regular / Large / Desktop Widget
features.evidence: WindowMode + per-size *GlassWidget views; e2e size-switching harness exists (needs Accessibility TCC to run headless)

features.title: Dynamic-notch (menu-bar island) widget
features.evidence: DynamicIslandWidget.swift; live window observed at layer 25

features.title: Always-on-top (keepWindowInFront)
features.evidence: RUNTIME-VERIFIED 2026-07-02: CGWindowList shows widget at layer 3 (.floating)

features.title: Desktop layer back-pin: below icons, .stationary, ignoresCycle
Non-draggable desktop-widget mode (isMovable=false)
Tab-slide settings menu: radio sections push sub-pages (trailing-edge slide, back header pop)

features.title: Live 'Now Playing From' source indicator (3 honest states)
features.evidence: NowPlayingSourceRow leaf view; per-tick invariant respected

features.title: Keyboard shortcut recorder UI (10 actions, 3 groups)
Shortcut persistence: UserDefaults 'keyboardShortcuts' flat-array JSON, reload at launch
